species.name: Goblin
species.description: A small, green-skinned creature known for its mischievous nature.

species.name: Forest Sprite
species.description: Tiny, ethereal beings that guard ancient woodlands.

species.name: Cave Dweller
species.description: A hunched creature adapted to subterranean life, with keen night vision.

species.name: Desert Nomad
species.description: Resilient beings that traverse vast sands, masters of survival.

species.name: River Folk
species.description: Amphibious humanoids with smooth skin, living in harmony with rivers.

species.name: Mountain Clan
species.description: Sturdy humanoids with a strong build, accustomed to high altitudes.

species.name: Swamp Beast
species.description: A creature covered in moss and mud, blending seamlessly with its murky habitat.

species.name: Plains Runner
species.description: Swift and agile humanoids, known for their incredible speed across open fields.

species.name: Ice Golem
species.description: A construct of living ice, slow but incredibly durable.

species.name: Fire Imp
species.description: Small, mischievous creatures made of living flame, often found near volcanoes.

species.name: Wind Whisperer
species.description: Ethereal beings that communicate through gusts of wind, rarely seen.

species.name: Stonekin
species.description: Humanoids with rocky skin, known for their unwavering resolve.

species.name: Shadow Stalker
species.description: Creatures of pure shadow, moving silently and unseen in the dark.

species.name: Deep Sea Diver
species.description: Beings adapted to immense pressure and darkness of the ocean depths.

species.name: Sky Sentinel
species.description: Winged humanoids that patrol the skies, protectors of the upper realms.

species.name: Elf
species.description: An agile and wise being with a deep connection to nature.

species.name: Griffin
species.description: A majestic beast with the body of a lion and the head and wings of an eagle.

species.name: Unicorn
species.description: A mythical horse with a single, spiraling horn, known for its purity.

species.name: Phoenix
species.description: A legendary bird that regenerates from its own ashes, symbolizing rebirth.

species.name: Werewolf
species.description: A humanoid with the ability to shapeshift into a wolf-like creature under the full moon.

species.name: Vampire
species.description: An undead being that subsists on the blood of the living, possessing supernatural strength.

species.name: Naga
species.description: Serpentine humanoids with enchanting voices, dwelling in ancient ruins.

species.name: Minotaur
species.description: A powerful creature with the head of a bull and the body of a man, known for its labyrinthine homes.

species.name: Dragon
species.description: A powerful and ancient beast, capable of breathing fire.

species.name: Lich
species.description: An undead sorcerer who has achieved immortality through dark magic, commanding legions of the dead.

items.name: Health Potion
items.effect: Restores a small amount of health.
